Notice Of Motion For Entry Of Default Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-16-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840

Denis Klavdianos, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, MOUNTAIN STATES COMMERCIAL COLLECTIONS, INC., A CORPORATION.
Order Granting Waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant INNOVATIVE WINDOWS, INC., A CORPORATION,
Default of Defendants has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendants as follows:

Damages: $74,023.49
Pre-Judgment Interest: $18,759.12
Attorney's Fees: $2,825.00
Costs: $705.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $96,312.61

Judgment signed in open court.
